description: A smooth grayish block of cleaned and rendered monster fat.  It will remain 'fresh' for a very long time, and can be used as an ingredient in many projects.  You could eat it, but it will poison you.
//: Not for use in edible/foodsafe recipes.  Inefficiency is handled by tainted tallow recipe requiring 200% as much materials input as regular tallow recipe.

description: A thick wax candle made from tainted tallow.  It doesn't provide very much light, but it can burn for quite a long time.  You'll need a lighter or matches to light it, though you're honestly not sure that's a good idea.
A thick wax candle.  It doesn't provide very much light, but it can burn for quite a long time.  This candle is lit.  The smoke it produces smells incredibly foul.
